name: ordovera-plugins
description: Open source Claude Code plugins for building, securing, and governing AI agent systems

plugins.name: context-setup
plugins.description: Scaffold, audit, align, optimize MCP tools, and upgrade context engineering files. Generates AGENTS.md files, context directories, and cascading structures from project analysis.

plugins.name: top10-scan
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10:2025 multi-layer security audit. Orchestrates Opengrep (SAST), ZAP (DAST), and native package manager SCA (npm audit, pip-audit, cargo audit, govulncheck) alongside Claude's design-level analysis.

plugins.name: mcp-audit
plugins.description: MCP server governance analysis. Discovers servers from curated lists and GitHub, extracts tool inventories, classifies read/write sensitivity, and detects auth, logging, and confirmation gate patterns.
